title: Example Sentence Bank
description: Schema for a chunked dictionary example sentence file

groupId.description: Numeric ID matchable across dictionaries to group similar sentences (e.g., a Tatoeba sentence ID).

sentenceReading.description: Optional reading for the entire sentence (e.g., kana only).

tokens.description: Space-separated string of base terms/tokens present in the sentence for FTS indexing.

tags.description: List of string tags (e.g., 'slang', 'idiom'). These reference definitions provided in Yomitan tag_bank_*.json files (schema: '../../dictionaries/yomitan_schema/yomitan-tag-bank-schema.json').

stats.description: List of numeric stats associated with the sentence (e.g., frequency, JLPT level, difficulty).

url.description: Local path/URL to the audio file inside the archive.

tags.description: Tags specific to this audio file (e.g., 'native', 'female'). These map directly to definitions provided in Yomitan tag_bank_*.json files.

stats.description: Numeric stats specific to this audio file (e.g., clarity score, speed).

statName.description: The backend identifier for the stat (e.g., 'freq', 'JLPT', 'quality').

displayName.description: Optional user-friendly label for the stat (e.g., 'Frequency', 'JLPT Level').

value.description: The strictly numeric value used for sorting/filtering in the database.

displayValue.description: Optional formatted representation of the value (e.g., 'N5', 'uncommon').
